summary: The oil industry has spent more than a century pushing into new frontiers. Its engineers pulled crude from beneath deserts, oceans and frozen tundra. Its traders built markets that turned oil into the world’s most actively traded commodity.

title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：Carrum Health 重新制定护理激励措施
summary: “You show me the incentive and I’ll show you the behavior,” says Sach Jain, founder and CEO of Carrum Health. Jain joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Jonathan Palmer to explain why misaligned incentives sit at the heart of specialty care’s cost problem. Jain details how Carrum built a value-based marketplace around curated centers of excellence, surgeon-level quality data, bundled payments and provider risk, giving employers more predictable costs while offering patients a guided care path wit

title_cn: 德国将购买美国战斧导弹以缩小关键差距
summary: Germany agreed with the US to purchase long-range, subsonic Tomahawk cruise missiles to close a dangerous gap with Russia — although numbers and delivery timelines remain unclear, and Europe is developing such missiles itself.

title: Why Fed Cuts Beat Rate Hikes
title_cn: 为何美联储降息击败加息
summary: Markets may be pricing yesterday's economy. iCapital's Dan Suzuki joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why slowing job growth and cooling inflation make Fed rate cuts more likely than hikes, why higher Treasury yields haven't broken the stock rally, and why AI leadership may be shifting away from chipmakers toward hyperscalers that can actually monetize their massive investments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Finds a New Way to Help Investors Avoid Elon Musk
title_cn: 华尔街找到了一种帮助投资者避开埃隆·马斯克的新方法
summary: For every investor who wants more Elon Musk, Wall Street increasingly has an ETF. Now it’s planning some for investors who want less.

title: A New Texas Mayor Takes Over Amid 2,200% Tax-Base Boom
title_cn: 德克萨斯州新市长接任，税基繁荣 2,200%
summary: Mark Hill, the new mayor of Frisco, Texas, talks about the challenges and opportunities of managing a city whose population has soared soared 600% and whose tax base is up 2,200% in the past 25 years. He speaks with Bloomberg's Julie Fine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Fintech Lendable Pledges Personal Loans to Raise £500 Million
title_cn: 英国 Fintech Lendable 承诺筹集 5 亿英镑个人贷款
summary: UK digital lender Lendable Ltd. is raising £500 million ($671 million) by selling securities backed by a portfolio of personal loans, a deal that would support its ambitions to push further into lending.

summary: Most emerging-market currencies are rebounding on Thursday from losses the day before as oil edges lower, with investors playing down the scope of resumed hostilities between the US and Iran.

title_cn: 玉米、大豆价格走在 WASDE 之前，贸易商因炎热天气有所缓解
summary: Corn and soybean futures were easing on pressure from an improving US weather outlook as traders looked ahead to the monthly WASDE supply and demand outlook due Friday.

title: Nigerian Stocks Vault Past Korea’s Kospi to Claim World’s Top Returns
title_cn: 尼日利亚股市超越韩国 Kospi 成为全球回报率最高的股票
summary: Nigerian equities have overtaken South Korea’s to hand investors the highest dollar-based returns this year, as souring sentiment on artificial-intelligence stocks pushes the Asian nation’s world-beating rally into bear territory.

title: Tech Drives US Stocks Higher as Traders Downplay Iran War Risks
title_cn: 交易员淡化伊朗战争风险，科技股推动美国股市走高
summary: US stocks rose as investors put aside concerns over the latest flare-up between the US and Iran to pile on technology stocks after recent declines spurred dip buying.

title: Stocks Get Boost From Chipmakers as Oil Declines: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油价格下跌，芯片制造商提振股市：市场结束
summary: A resurgence in giant chipmakers powered a rebound on Wall Street, with stocks also rising amid a decline in oil prices as traders looked past fresh hostilities between the US and Iran.

title: Hormuz Shipping Grinds to Near Halt After US, Iran Strikes
title_cn: 美国和伊朗袭击后霍尔木兹航运几乎停止
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz came to a near standstill after the US struck Iran for a second straight day, leaving a fragile truce between the two sides looking increasingly shaky.

title: Airbus Employees in Spain Go on Strike Over Working Conditions
title_cn: 空客西班牙员工因工作条件举行罢工
summary: Airbus SE employees at a major manufacturing site in Spain have gone on strike in protest of what they say are deteriorating work conditions over the past years.

title: Trump Stops in UK to Switch Air Force One Planes
title_cn: 特朗普在英国停留更换空军一号飞机
summary:
President Trump’s return from the NATO summit in Turkey took a detour when he switched Air Force One planes in the UK.

Annmarie Hordern explains why the new Qatari-donated jet is raising security questions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Gas Prices Jump as Qatar Pauses Push to Ramp Up LNG
title_cn: 卡塔尔暂停增加液化天然气产量，欧洲天然气价格上涨
summary: European natural gas prices jumped above €50 a megawatt-hour for the first time in a month after a report that Qatar is pausing efforts to rapidly revive production at the world’s largest liquefied natural gas facility, threatening a recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US 30-Year Bond Auction Set to Draw Highest Yield in 20 Years
title_cn: 美国30年期债券拍卖收益率将创下20年来最高水平
summary: An auction of 30-year Treasury bonds Thursday is poised to draw the highest yield since at least 2006, underscoring how swelling bond supply is driving investors to demand higher returns from government debt.

title: Oil Edges Lower as Traders Assess Renewed US-Iran Hostilities
title_cn: 随着交易商评估美伊新的敌对行动，油价走低
summary:
Oil edged lower as traders assessed renewed US strikes against Iran, with the limited scope of the hostilities prompting bets that energy shipments through the Persian Gulf will resume their recent recovery.
Leslie Palti-Guzman, founder at Energy Vista, discusses the outlook for energy as tensions ramp up in the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UBS Strategists Turn Biggest European Stock Bulls With 8% Upside
title_cn: 瑞银 (UBS) 策略师将欧洲股市上涨 8% 转为看多
summary: Stronger earnings and a broadening rally will power European stocks to new highs this year, according to UBS Group AG strategists, who are now the biggest bulls among forecasters tracked by Bloomberg.

title: Africa CDC Urges Congo to Pay Striking Ebola Workers
title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心敦促刚果向罢工的埃博拉工人支付工资
summary: Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention is working with the Democratic Republic of Congo to speed up overdue payments to Ebola responders after strikes in the epidemic’s epicenter threatened efforts to contain what officials say is the world’s fastest-growing Ebola outbreak.

title: Dronemaker Helsing Alters Staff Stock Plan Before Funding Round
title_cn: 无人机制造商赫尔辛在融资前改变员工股票计划
summary: European defense startup Helsing has overhauled its internal share program, alienating some staff as the company finalizes its biggest funding round to date.

title: Flexport CEO Warns Shipping Risks Remain
title_cn: Flexport 首席执行官警告运输风险依然存在
summary: Flexport CEO Ryan Petersen joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the biggest threat to global shipping isn't the Strait of Hormuz—it's still the Red Sea. He breaks down the surge in imports driven by tariff uncertainty, why companies are stockpiling inventory after the COVID supply chain crisis, and how Panama Canal drought risks could create the next bottleneck. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Missile Stockpiles Under Pressure
title_cn: 美国导弹库存面临压力
summary: Germany is buying US Tomahawk missiles even as Europe races to build its own defense industry. Bloomberg Economics' Becca Wasser joins Open Interest to explain why America is prioritizing its own missile stockpiles, why Europe still depends on U.S. weapons, and how China's industrial strength is reshaping the global military balance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC Blocks for Now CME’s Plan to Offer 24/7 Oil Futures
title_cn: CFTC 暂时阻止 CME 提供 24/7 石油期货的计划
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has blocked for now CME Group Inc.’s bid to start offering round-the-clock trading in oil futures.

title: SEC’s Semiannual Reporting Plan Prompts Accounting Board Review
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会的半年度报告计划促使会计委员会进行审查
summary:
The US accounting board is examining if any changes to its rulebook are necessary should the Securities and Exchange Commission scale back how often publicly traded companies need to report their earnings to investors.
Sandy Peters, Senior Head of Global Advocacy at CFA Institute, discusses sentiment around a potential move to semi-annual reporting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Edges Lower as Traders Assess Renewed US-Iran Hostilities
title_cn: 随着交易商评估美伊新的敌对行动，油价走低
summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed renewed US strikes against Iran, with the limited scope of the hostilities prompting bets that energy shipments through the Persian Gulf will resume their recent recovery.

title: Canada’s Well Health Preps C$150 Million High-Yield Bond Sale
title_cn: 加拿大 Well Health 准备发行 1.5 亿加元高收益债券
summary: Well Health Technologies Corp. is looking to sell C$150 million ($106 million) of high-yield bonds maturing in five years, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Senegal’s Political Rupture Raises Risk of Debt Reprofile, Says Citibank
title_cn: 花旗银行表示，塞内加尔的政治破裂增加了债务调整的风险
summary: Citigroup Inc. said the political rupture between Senegal’s president and his former premier has increased the likelihood of a debt reprofiling rather than a restructuring.

title: Your ETF of the Moment: Winning Big With ‘Trump Accounts’
title_cn: 您当前的 ETF：利用“王牌账户”大获全胜
summary: They are reshaping stock ownership, and one exchange-traded fund in particular stands to benefit handsomely.

title: PepsiCo Up on Earnings; Costco Moves on Comparable Sales Miss | Stock Movers
title_cn: 百事可乐盈利增长；好市多（Costco）针对可比销售小姐采取行动库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- PepsiCo (PEP) shares are higher as it reported core earnings per share for the second quarter that beat the average analyst estimate.
- Levi Strauss (LEVI) shares are lower as its full-year forecast boost underwhelmed, despite its earnings beating the average analyst estimate.
- Costco (COST) shares are moving as reported total comparable sales for June that missed the average analyst estimate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 7/9/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 7 月 9 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exclusive: Zuckerberg on Meta's AI Push
title_cn: 独家：扎克伯格谈 Meta 的人工智能推动
summary: Meta is making its biggest AI monetization move yet. Bloomberg's Kurt Wagner had an exclusive interview with Mark Zuckerberg. They talked about why the company is betting on ultra-low API pricing to win developers, how Meta plans to turn massive AI investments into real revenue, and what the AI transformation means for employees, investors, and the race against OpenAI and Google. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Fed Chairman Ben Bernanke Joins Anthropic Oversight Trust
title_cn: 前美联储主席本·伯南克加入人类监督信托基金
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chairman Ben Bernanke has been appointed to Anthropic’s long-term benefit trust, an oversight body meant to keep the artificial intelligence company accountable to its public mission.

title: California Lawmakers Seek to Boost Reserves Ahead of Hot AI IPOs
title_cn: 加州立法者寻求在热门人工智能 IPO 之前增加储备
summary: The AI-driven stock market rally has bolstered California’s coffers, sending revenue soaring. Now lawmakers are asking voters to overhaul the state’s financial reserves to capture more of any future windfall.

title: Bitcoin-Backed Muni Bond Fails to Get New Hampshire Sign Off
title_cn: 比特币支持的市政债券未能获得新罕布什尔州批准
summary: New Hampshire’s executive council voted down a proposal to bring the first Bitcoin-backed bond to the municipal market.

title: AI Office Demand Seen Spreading Beyond NYC, San Francisco
title_cn: 人工智能办公需求蔓延至纽约、旧金山以外地区
summary: AI-focused tech firms are stepping up searches for office space, and New York and San Francisco won’t be the only cities to benefit from their fast expansion.

title: B Capital-Led Group Buys Russell Investments
title_cn: B Capital 主导的集团收购 Russell Investments
summary: Russell Investments is being acquired by a group of investors led by B Capital Group and California Public Employees’ Retirement System to ready the asset manager for the AI era. Silla Brush reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Boosts US Spending to $250 Billion to Feed Memory Boom
title_cn: 美光将美国支出增加至 2500 亿美元以推动内存繁荣
summary: Micron Technology Inc. plans to increase its spending on new plants in the US to $250 billion to help meet unprecedented demand for its memory chips fueled by the global artificial intelligence boom.

title: ION Platform’s Bonds Get a Boost as Revenue and Profit Rise
title_cn: ION 平台的债券随着收入和利润的增长而上涨
summary: ION Platform reported stronger earnings and lower cash payments to its parent company in the second quarter, reassuring holders of beaten-down bonds issued by the financial software provider.

title: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯表示人工智能现在是他主要的通胀担忧
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said that among the drivers of inflation in the US, he’s most focused on demand driven by artificial intelligence. And if that demand persists, it could force the central bank to raise interest rates.

title: Altman Says OpenAI Made ‘Many Changes’ During Talks With US
title_cn: Altman 表示 OpenAI 在与美国谈判期间做出了“许多改变”
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman said his company made “many changes” during its discussions with the Trump administration before moving ahead with releasing its newest artificial intelligence models to the general public.

title: How One of the World’s Largest Publicly-Traded Hedge Funds Is Using AI
title_cn: 全球最大的公开交易对冲基金之一如何使用人工智能
summary:
Right now, AI's use in investing is a mixed bag: People are excited about its potential, but several firms are still trying to figure out its value.

Man Group's CTO Gary Collier and Head of Data and AI Tushara Fernando join Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal to talk about how one of the largest publicly-traded hedge funds in the world is actually implementing AI into its work. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TeraWulf Eyes $3.5 Billion for Anthropic-Leased Data Center
title_cn: TeraWulf 计划斥资 35 亿美元建设 Anthropic 租赁数据中心
summary: TeraWulf Inc. is preparing to raise about $3.5 billion in debt to build a data center campus in Kentucky, including its first-ever foray into the leveraged loan market.

title: AI Training Startup Mercor Discusses $20 Billion Valuation
title_cn: AI 培训初创公司 Mercor 讨论 200 亿美元估值
summary: Mercor, a startup that helps improve artificial intelligence models with rich specialized data, is discussing raising new funds at a roughly $20 billion valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: JPMorgan Says Investors Adapt to `Everywhere' AI Trade
title_cn: 摩根大通表示投资者适应“无处不在”的人工智能交易
summary: David Lebovitz, global market strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, says artificial intelligence is becoming an "everywhere'' trade and investors are getting better at distinguishing opportunities. "AI is everywhere. And so it’s how you play it, not whether or not you play it,'' he says on Bloomberg Television's "Surveillance.'" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Says Everything Is an AI Trade: ‘It’s How You Play It’
title_cn: 摩根大通称一切都是人工智能交易：“这取决于你的玩法”
summary: Investors are getting better at distinguishing between the potential risks and rewards in artificial intelligence, according to JPMorgan Asset Management’s David Lebovitz, a crucial lesson for Wall Street as AI becomes an “everywhere” trade.

title: Zuckerberg Pledges ‘Aggressive’ Pricing With Meta’s First Pay-to-Use AI
title_cn: 扎克伯格承诺为 Meta 首个付费使用人工智能提供“激进”定价
summary: In a crowded market for AI tools, Mark Zuckerberg wants to win on price.

title: Starbucks Taps AI to Cut Reliance on Microsoft, IBM Software
title_cn: 星巴克利用人工智能来减少对微软、IBM 软件的依赖
summary: Starbucks Corp. is developing in-house tools with the help of artificial intelligence that could replace some software applications it now buys from companies such as Microsoft Corp. and International Business Machines Corp.

title: Micron Raises Planned Spending to Meet Memory Chip Demand
title_cn: 美光提高计划支出以满足内存芯片需求
summary: Micron's stock surged following the company's announcement of a planned investment of up to $3 billion aimed at bolstering the U.S. semiconductor supply chain. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GOP Candidates Break With Trump on Data Centers to Boost Midterm Odds
title_cn: 共和党候选人在数据中心问题上与特朗普决裂以提高中期胜算
summary: Progressive lawmakers Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders led the first wave of opposition to data centers. Now Republican candidates around the US are seizing on the fervor even as President Donald Trump actively courts tech titans and promotes the rapid, streamlined expansion of the energy-hungry facilities.

title: Racquel Oden on Market, Inflation and AI Rally
title_cn: 拉克尔·奥登 (Racquel Oden) 谈市场、通胀和人工智能集会
summary: Racquel Oden, HSBC’s head of wealth and private banking, discussed how she is guiding clients through rapidly shifting market narratives. She emphasized focusing on long-term fundamentals. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TCS Quarterly Net Income Climbs as Deals Cushion IT Slump
title_cn: TCS 季度净利润攀升，交易缓解 IT 低迷
summary: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. reported a nearly 5% rise in quarterly profit with a string of cost-cutting efforts and deals helping Asia’s largest outsourcer weather a slump in the sector.

title: Reporters’ Social Media Challenge Lands With a Thud
title_cn: 记者的社交媒体挑战赛轰动一时
summary: They find posting feels like a performance rather than real communication

title: A Startup That Builds AI Agents Used One to Raise $100 Million
title_cn: 一家构建 AI 代理的初创公司利用其中一个筹集了 1 亿美元
summary: A startup that helps enterprises build AI agents proved the technology’s value in the most practical way possible: by deploying one during its own fundraising.

title: Labor Shortages Are Putting a Bug in the Data Center Build
title_cn: 劳动力短缺给数据中心建设带来了缺陷
summary: Contractors like Sterling Infrastructure and Comfort Systems USA have more work than they have skilled labor for.

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Drops After $3 Billion Hong Kong Debut
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密在香港上市 30 亿美元后股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. fell in its Hong Kong trading debut on Thursday after raising HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) in the city’s biggest listing this year so far.

title: Can a Man Wearing a Trash Can Expose Farage’s Weakness?
title_cn: 一个穿着垃圾的男人能暴露法拉奇的弱点吗？
summary: Can a man wearing a trash can really take on Reform UK’s Nigel Farage? Lizzy Burden explains what you need to know about Count Binface. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham to Scrap Treasury Split, Empower PM’s Office Instead
title_cn: 伯纳姆将废除财政部拆分，转而赋予总理办公室权力
summary: The UK’s likely next prime minister Andy Burnham will look to give his own office more oversight of economic policy, but will scrap plans to break up the Treasury in the immediate future, a key ally said.

title: Egypt Holds Rates a Third Time With US-Iran Peace Push at Risk
title_cn: 埃及第三次维持利率不变，美伊和平进程面临风险
summary: Egypt left interest rates unchanged for a third consecutive meeting, opting for caution with a fragile US-Iran ceasefire at risk of unraveling.

title: Khamenei to Be Laid to Rest as the US and Iran Resume Attacks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗恢复袭击，哈梅内伊将下葬
summary: Iran is preparing to bury the remains of its slain Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, more than four months after he was assassinated in US-Israeli airstrikes and amid renewed fighting with the US.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes as Fears Grow of a Return to War
title_cn: 由于担心重新爆发战争，美国和伊朗进行空袭
summary:
The US military attacked Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome.
Dan Williams, Middle East Reporter based in Jerusalem, discusses the latest on the conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany Proposes Consumer Levy to Fund Emergency Gas Reserve
title_cn: 德国提议征收消费者税以资助紧急天然气储备
summary: The German government has proposed adding a surcharge to consumer energy bills to help finance a strategic natural gas reserve designed to keep supplies flowing in a worst-case crisis.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes as Fears Grow of a Return to War
title_cn: 由于担心重新爆发战争，美国和伊朗进行空袭
summary: The US military attacked Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome.

title: Merz’s Reforms for Germany Get Fitch Cheer But No Big Applause
title_cn: 默茨对德国的改革获得了惠誉的欢呼，但没有得到热烈的掌声
summary: Germany’s new reform package amounts to a step in the right direction but is still no game changer in addressing the troubles of its economy, according to Fitch Ratings.

title: Hormuz Ship Insurance Demand Drops as Owners Get Nervous
title_cn: 由于船东感到紧张，霍尔木兹船舶保险需求下降
summary: London marine insurers have been seeing fewer inquiries for journeys to transit the Strait of Hormuz and some said the cost of cover had risen, in a sign of growing caution from shipowners as the US and Iran exchange attacks.

title: Carney Gets High Marks on Economy Despite Recession Talk, Poll Says
title_cn: 民意调查显示，尽管有经济衰退的言论，卡尼在经济方面仍获得高分
summary: Canadians support Mark Carney’s approach to managing the economy, even though he’s presided over the worst first year of growth for a prime minister since at least 1963.

title: ActBlue Pulls In $586 Million for Democrats as Midterms Approach
title_cn: 随着中期选举的临近，ActBlue 为民主党筹集 5.86 亿美元
summary: ActBlue raised $586 million for Democratic candidates and causes in the second quarter, a record amount that will enhance the party’s fortunes as it prepares to confront Republicans in midterm elections that are projected to be the most expensive in US history.

title: EU to Favor European Providers in Public Service Contracts
title_cn: 欧盟将在公共服务合同中支持欧洲提供商
summary: The European Union is finalizing sweeping changes to its procurement rules that will allow national governments favor European suppliers in critical public services.

title: Why Did Trump Switch Planes on His Way Back From NATO?
title_cn: 特朗普为何在从北约返回途中调换飞机？
summary: President Donald Trump’s return to the US from the NATO summit in Turkey took a detour when he switched Air Force One planes at a military base in the United Kingdom. Annmarie Hordern reports from Ankara. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Democrats Will Replace Platner on Maine’s Senate Ballot
title_cn: 民主党将如何在缅因州参议院投票中取代普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrats are racing to salvage their bid to defeat Sen. Susan Collins after Graham Platner suspended his campaign Wednesday evening.

title: Trump Gives Ukraine a Boost, Bolstering West’s Optimism
title_cn: 特朗普提振乌克兰，提振西方乐观情绪
summary: A Patriot missiles promise and praise for Zelenskyy adds to Kyiv’s momentum

title: Merz Says Political Fringes Will Send Germany to ‘the Abyss’
title_cn: 默茨表示政治边缘将使德国陷入“深渊”
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz made a plea for Germany’s political middle ground as he touted a comprehensive reform agenda — and warned that the rise of fringe parties including the far right risks sending the country “into the abyss.”

title: Platner Suspends Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegation
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳暂停缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse, throwing a crucial race for the party into turmoil.

title: Talarico’s $30 Million Haul Crushes Paxton in Texas Race
title_cn: Talarico 在德克萨斯州比赛中以 3000 万美元的成绩击败 Paxton
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico received $30 million in second-quarter donations in his campaign for US Senate, more than tripling the amount Republican challenger Ken Paxton amassed in what will be one of the most expensive campaigns of the November midterm elections.

title: El legado de Fujimori expone los límites de la estrategia anti-China de Trump en Perú
title_cn: 藤森的遗产暴露了特朗普在秘鲁反华战略的局限性
summary: Keiko Fujimori podría ser el tipo de líder que Donald Trump desea en América Latina. Pero los profundos vínculos de Perú con China muestran lo difícil que será para Washington revertir los avances de Pekín en la región.

title: Starmer Exits World Stage Unsure His Foreign Policy Will Endure
title_cn: 斯塔默退出世界舞台，不确定他的外交政策能否持久
summary: Keir Starmer’s swansong trip as Britain’s prime minister to the NATO summit this week sought to cement a shaky diplomatic legacy for a successor who’s untested in the international arena.

title: Stranded Oil Ships Clear Out of Gulf as Owners Get Wary Again
title_cn: 船东再次保持警惕，搁浅的油船已离开海湾
summary: A huge backlog of oil tankers that got stuck inside the Persian Gulf because of the Iran war has almost cleared out — just in time for a fresh military flare up to create renewed uncertainty about how safe the region is for ships.

title: Ukraine Hits More Russian Fuel Tankers as Shortages Worsen
title_cn: 随着短缺加剧，乌克兰袭击了更多俄罗斯油轮
summary: Ukraine said it hit 12 more tankers in southern Russia as Kyiv expands the scope of attacks that are deepening a nationwide gasoline shortage.

title: India and Australia Clinch Energy, Security Deals to Deepen Ties
title_cn: 印度和澳大利亚达成能源、安全协议以深化关系
summary: India and Australia clinched deals ranging from energy to defense on Thursday, taking their bilateral relationship to a new level in response to growing concern over security in the Indo-Pacific.

title: Chinese Officials Gauge US Truce, Elections in Low-Key Meetings
title_cn: 中国官员在低调会议上评估美国休战和选举
summary: A pair of former Chinese diplomats visited the US last month to better understand the Trump administration’s stance on a fragile trade truce, according to people familiar with the matter, as China seeks to gauge how upcoming US elections might affect ties.

title: NATO Success Is Surviving a Summit With Trump
title_cn: 北约的成功在于与特朗普的峰会
summary: By the time he had departed Turkey’s capital, Trump said he felt the “love” of the other leaders.

title: US, Iran Trade Attacks, Casting Doubt on Talks
title_cn: 美国、伊朗贸易攻击，对谈判产生质疑
summary: The US military struck Iran for a second day, hitting about 90 targets to further degrade the Islamic Republic’s ability to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Future of Hormuz Is Testing Oman’s Balancing Act
title_cn: 霍尔木兹的未来如何考验阿曼的平衡行为
summary: Oman has been thrust to the forefront of global geopolitics by the Iran war and closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: India Pushes Back Against US Forced-Labor Claims as Tariffs Loom
title_cn: 关税迫在眉睫，印度反击美国强迫劳动指控
summary: India defended itself against the threat of higher US tariffs, arguing that Washington failed to provide evidence the country lacked policies preventing forced labor, and was thereby disadvantaging American businesses.
